room.caption: [G5-3E] This map is just here to give you a sinking feeling about the next one.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sSpazerPickup image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You upgraded your Beam to the Spazer Beam!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2800 instance_destroy()
